title: Maximum Product of Splitted Binary Tree
titleCn: 分裂二叉树的最大乘积

testcases.input: root = [1,2,3,4,5,6] Output: 110 Explanation: Remove the red edge and get 2 binary trees with sum 11 and 10. Their product is 110 (11*10)
testcases.expectedOutput: 110 Explanation: Remove the red edge and get 2 binary trees with sum 11 and 10. Their product is 110 (11*10)

testcases.input: root = [1,null,2,3,4,null,null,5,6] Output: 90 Explanation: Remove the red edge and get 2 binary trees with sum 15 and 6.Their product is 90 (15*6)
testcases.expectedOutput: 90 Explanation: Remove the red edge and get 2 binary trees with sum 15 and 6.Their product is 90 (15*6)
